shots.visual_action: The dog sits by a window and looks at distant evening light.
shots.composition: medium-wide shot, dog on lower-left third, empty space above

shots.visual_action: The same dog walks beside a distant companion in a warm memory.
shots.scene_state: quiet road in a warm memory
shots.composition: side view, both figures small, road leading forward
shots.previous_panel_summary: The dog was alone by a window.

shots.visual_action: The companion gradually walks away while the dog stops.
shots.scene_state: same road becoming cooler and emptier
shots.composition: wide rear view, growing distance between figures
shots.previous_panel_summary: They were walking side by side.

shots.visual_action: The dog turns forward and continues alone along the road.
shots.scene_state: early morning road with soft light
shots.composition: rear three-quarter view, dog moving toward open space
shots.previous_panel_summary: The companion disappeared into the distance.
